ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition entry */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Current weather outlook (e.g., Sunny, Overcast, Rain) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Current temperature condition (e.g., Hot, Mild, Cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Current humidity condition (e.g., High, Normal) */,
  "wind_strength" TEXT /* Current wind strength condition (e.g., Weak, Strong) */,
  "temperature_value" REAL /* Actual temperature value in Celsius or Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity_percentage" REAL /* Actual humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Actual wind speed in km/h or mph */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in mm or inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition for this decision */,
  "play_tennis" TEXT /* Decision on whether to play tennis (Yes/No) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the decision-making algorithm (0-100%) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision (e.g., high winds, heavy rain, extreme temperatures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_decisions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the facility */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last maintained */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled calibration date for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition this data represents */,
  "data_collection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "sensor_reading_value" REAL /* Actual sensor reading value */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the sensor location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition for this historical entry */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the weather condition was recorded */,
  "play_decision" TEXT /* Decision on whether to play tennis on this date (Yes/No) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Actual temperature value in Celsius or Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Actual humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Actual wind speed in km/h or mph */,
  "court_occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of players on the court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tennis court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface used on the court */,
  "lighting_quality" TEXT /* Quality of lighting for night play */,
  "is_indoor" INTEGER /* Indication of whether the court is indoor or outdoor */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Available equipment on the court */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Available amenities near the court */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set these preferences */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert the user wishes to receive (e.g., weather, maintenance) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of receiving notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "preferred_court_type" TEXT /* Preferred court type (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "preferred_surface" TEXT /* Preferred surface type (e.g., hard, clay) */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel for alerts and notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, staff, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the user (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "playing_frequency" TEXT /* Playing frequency of the user (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the alert */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the alert message */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Specific weather condition that triggered the alert */,
  "user_response" TEXT /* User's response to the alert (e.g., acknowledged, ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that was maintained */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair, replacement) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "personnel_responsible" TEXT /* Personnel responsible for performing the maintenance */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated completion time for the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES facility_courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition this forecast represents */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "predicted_outlook" TEXT /* Predicted outlook for the forecast date */,
  "predicted_temperature" TEXT /* Predicted temperature for the forecast date */,
  "predicted_humidity" TEXT /* Predicted humidity for the forecast date */,
  "predicted_wind_strength" TEXT /* Predicted wind strength for the forecast date */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (0-100%) */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast (e.g., weather service provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)
